textByHashes.f81be5d8fc54d323099e292d30101023b927af04: Thank you once again. Have you spoken to Ali Morrisane yet?
textByHashes.305885a9369e2c173235febda8684c00aae93028: Well, not to be immodest, but it was all my idea.
textByHashes.77e5def6c60a82f72c4b9d0d628309c4cc913444: Our little town needed help, and I knew it'd take the greatest salesman in Gielinor to attract an adventurer strong enough to help us out.
textByHashes.b22a84235bf31d5d36871140a23b90a26a716dcf: In any case, I have my mayoral duties to attend to. I have lots of new citizens to register!
